_doc: Scars of Mirrodin (SOM) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/som.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 101C / 60U / 53R / 15M. Collation: sequential, C1/C2 commons. Occasional foil (1:67) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Large set. Printed in USA and Belgium. 36 packs per box. Booster has both a basic land and an ad card. Most marketing cards have a token or tip printed on the front face (token-on-ad-card), so the slot is recorded as adCard:true, token:false.

draft.tagline: 10 commons · 3 uncommons · 1× rare/mythic · 1 basic land · foil 1:67
